requestedComponents.label: cockpit shell and main panel blockout
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use the DC-9-51 primary image for silhouette, panel density, windshield framing, and color family. Source geometry may be mixed only when variant scope is recorded.

requestedComponents.label: captain and first-officer yoke pair
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Prioritize shape, placement, checklist placard, and column hierarchy. Record pivot and animation evidence in the source report before assembly.

requestedComponents.label: throttle pedestal blockout and source candidates
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use the primary photo for placement and broad shape. Require selected and rejected source candidates before assembly.

requestedComponents.label: main panel gauge density set
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Represent dense analog gauge clusters without operational training detail. Source exact gauge candidates separately when available.

requestedComponents.label: overhead panel density placeholder
requestedComponents.acceptanceNotes: Use the primary image for position and density only. Do not finalize switch layout without close-up sources.
